scenes.description: 黄色小熊站在木门前,表情从疑惑转为惊恐；镜头切换至巨大的豌豆藤蔓,兔子和小猫在上面显得害怕。文字提示‘豌豆藤蔓不知为什么变大了’、‘太可怕了’。
scenes.video_prompt: A cartoon-style scene featuring a yellow bear in blue overalls standing in front of a wooden door, its expression shifting from confusion to fear. The camera pans up to reveal a massive pea vine stretching into the sky, with a white rabbit and brown cat clinging to it, both wide-eyed with terror. The background shows a bright blue sky, fluffy clouds, an orange cottage, and green bushes. Natural lighting creates a soft, vibrant atmosphere. Text appears: 'The pea vine grew huge!' and 'So scary!'. Camera movement: slow zoom-in on the bear, then upward pan.

style_elements.characters: Expressive animated animals: yellow bear with blue overalls, white rabbit with long ears, brown cat with round eyes
style_elements.environment: Sunny outdoor setting with orange cottage, wooden door, green foliage, and giant pea vine
style_elements.visual_style: Bright, colorful 2D animation with soft shading and exaggerated expressions

scenes.description: 小兔子微笑闭眼,随后老鼠与小熊出现,老鼠严肃宣布必须扳倒曼藤。三人互动展现任务的紧迫性。
scenes.video_prompt: Close-up of a smiling white rabbit with a blue bow, eyes closed in joy. Cut to a serious red-hatted mouse and surprised yellow bear standing together under the giant pea vine. The mouse raises a paw decisively as text reads: 'We must bring down Man-Teng!'. Background features the same cottage and sky. Bright, saturated colors maintain a whimsical tone despite rising tension. Natural daylight enhances emotional contrast between the rabbit’s calm and the others’ urgency. Camera movement: quick cuts between characters, ending with a medium-wide shot of all three facing the vine.

style_elements.characters: Rabbit (blue bow, serene), mouse (red hat, stern), bear (yellow fur, shocked)
style_elements.environment: Same outdoor garden with orange house and towering pea vine
style_elements.visual_style: Animated storybook style with bold outlines and expressive facial animation
style_elements.camera_movement: Close-ups and quick cuts building narrative intensity

scenes.description: 小女孩在果园中手持黄绳专注观察,小熊也拿着绳子微笑。画面温馨,暗示他们准备救援行动。
scenes.video_prompt: A cheerful girl in a pink gingham dress and blue overalls holds a yellow rope, looking curiously at the giant pea vine in a lush orchard. Nearby, the yellow bear also grips two yellow ropes, smiling confidently. Wooden fence, fruit trees, and a small roofed shed add depth. Warm sunlight bathes the scene in golden tones. The visual style remains consistent with earlier segments—bright, cartoonish, and child-friendly. Camera movement: gentle tracking shot moving between the girl and bear, emphasizing teamwork and preparation.

style_elements.characters: Girl (pink dress, pigtails, focused), bear (same design, now holding ropes)
style_elements.environment: Orchard with fence, trees, scattered vegetables, and distant cottage
style_elements.visual_style: Whimsical 2D animation with high color contrast and soft shadows

scenes.description: 小动物们被困在高处的藤蔓上,小熊和小女孩齐心协力展开营救,最终成功将小猫救下。
scenes.video_prompt: High-angle view of the pea vine entwined around the rooftop, with rabbit and cat trembling atop. The girl and bear work together below, throwing ropes upward. The bear climbs skillfully while reassuring them. As he reaches the top, he lifts the cat down safely. Relief washes over everyone. The cat giggles, saying they want to play again. Soft wind rustles leaves; sunlight flickers through vines. Text appears: 'Hold on!', 'We’ll save you!'. Camera movement: dynamic crane shots from ground to roof, followed by close-ups of emotional reactions.

style_elements.characters: Bear (heroic), girl (supportive), cat and rabbit (initially scared, then playful)
style_elements.environment: Roof-level perspective with tangled vines, chimney, and sky backdrop
style_elements.visual_style: Action-oriented animation with fluid motion and dramatic angles
style_elements.camera_movement: Crane up, aerial views, and character-focused close-ups

scenes.description: 小熊被面条状藤蔓缠住,众人发笑；小胡在仓库制作工具,帮助处理豌豆问题。
scenes.video_prompt: Comedic scene where the yellow bear is wrapped tightly by noodle-like tendrils of the pea vine, struggling playfully. Others laugh, referencing his love for noodles. Cut to a workshop inside a wooden shed—'Xiao Hu' (a new character, a clever raccoon) operates a steaming machine converting peas into safe blocks. Text: 'Let’s cook it up!' and 'New home for the peas!'. Warm interior lighting contrasts with previous outdoor scenes. Visual style retains charm with added mechanical details. Camera movement: handheld-style shakes during struggle, steady close-ups in workshop.

style_elements.characters: Bear (trapped comically), Xiao Hu (raccoon inventor, apron and goggles)
style_elements.environment: Vine-covered yard and rustic indoor workshop with tools
style_elements.visual_style: Playful blend of slapstick and inventive design, semi-realistic textures
style_elements.camera_movement: Shaky cam for humor, stable close-ups for invention focus

scenes.description: 众人决定将豌豆藤移栽到公园作为盆景,开始搬运过程,体现环保与再利用理念。
scenes.video_prompt: Group effort to relocate the giant pea vine using wagons and ropes. The girl, bear, mouse, rabbit, and Xiao Hu pull it toward a park entrance. Signs read: 'New Home – Pea Vine Park'. Lush greenery surrounds a designated planter bed. The mood is joyful and purposeful. Text: 'Let’s give it a better life!'. Golden hour lighting casts long shadows, enhancing warmth. Consistent 2D animation with detailed crowd movement. Camera movement: wide dolly shots following the procession, ending with a high-angle view of the planting site.

style_elements.characters: Entire cast collaborating: bear, girl, mouse, rabbit, Xiao Hu
style_elements.environment: Pathway leading to public park with flower beds and benches
style_elements.visual_style: Harmonious, eco-themed animation with celebratory tone
style_elements.camera_movement: Dolly follow and elevated concluding shot

scenes.description: 购物归来的小女孩发现小猫在小熊怀里睡着,大家庆祝并准备豌豆米饭,但小猫因恐惧拒绝食用。
scenes.video_prompt: The girl returns from shopping with bags, surprised to find the kitten sleeping peacefully in the bear’s arms. She smiles, then joins others around a table where a large bowl of steamed peas is served. Text: 'Celebration meal!'. But the kitten hides, shaking head—'No more giant peas!'. Laughter fills the air. Interior setting: cozy dining room with checkered tablecloth, lanterns, and framed photos. Soft indoor light creates intimacy. Animation style softens further with tender expressions. Camera movement: circular tracking around the table, ending with tight group hug.

style_elements.characters: Girl (returning shopper), bear (gentle caretaker), kitten (sleepy, later fearful)
style_elements.environment: Cozy indoor kitchen-dining space with homely decor
style_elements.visual_style: Warm, sentimental animation with emphasis on emotional closure
style_elements.camera_movement: Circular tracking and final static group shot

scenes.description: 最后举行盛大的豌豆舞会,所有角色跳舞庆祝,欢乐收尾。
scenes.video_prompt: A festive dance party erupts in the garden under string lights. All characters—bear, girl, mouse, rabbit, kitten, Xiao Hu—dance joyfully around the now-potted pea vine in the park. Music pulses rhythmically; confetti falls. Text: 'Festival Time! Let’s jump!'. Colorful costumes enhance the merriment. Nighttime setting with glowing lanterns and starry sky adds magic. Style remains consistent: lively 2D animation with bouncy movements. Camera movement: sweeping arcs and spinning rotations matching the dance energy.

style_elements.characters: Full cast in celebratory mode, dancing with exaggerated motions
style_elements.environment: Nighttime park transformed into festival ground with lights and decorations
style_elements.visual_style: Energetic, musical animation with vibrant night palette
